meta.description: Full website content architecture, UX sitemap, and structured package data for ZanziRocks. Extracted and synthesised from all available source documents.

brand.name: ZanziRocks
brand.subTagline: From the Serengeti plains to coral island shores — all in one journey.
brand.postalAddress: Jaws Corner, Stone Town, P.O. Box 1477, Zanzibar, Tanzania
brand.tone: bold, adventurous, warm, trustworthy, local expertise
targetAudience: International leisure travellers (Europe, USA, Germany, UK)
USPs: Fly-in safari experiences departing directly from Zanzibar
Both Northern Circuit (Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire) & Southern Circuit (Nyerere/Selous)
Unique boat safaris on the Rufiji River
Whale shark snorkeling on Mafia Island
Private Land Cruiser / Land Rover with pop-up roof, window seat guaranteed
Flexible trip durations: 1 day to 6+ days

destinations.name: Zanzibar Island
highlights: Stone Town UNESCO heritage
beach resorts
spice tours
snorkeling
sunset dhow cruises
Jaws Corner

destinations.name: Nyerere National Park
highlights: Africa's largest national park
Rufiji River boat safari (hippos, crocodiles, birdlife)
Big game drives (elephants, lions, giraffes, buffalo)
Guided bush / walking safari with armed rangers
Maasai village cultural visit
Sandbank sunset watching

destinations.name: Serengeti National Park
highlights: The Great Wildebeest Migration (Dec–Mar in Ndutu; July–Oct river crossings)
Seronera River wildlife corridor
Endless savannah plains
Big Five predators: lion, leopard, cheetah
Ndutu area — wildebeest calving & migration breeding (Dec–Mar)

destinations.name: Ngorongoro Crater
highlights: World's largest intact volcanic caldera (100 sq miles)
Highest density of Big Five in Africa
Permanent wildlife — no seasonal migration needed
Flamingos on crater lake
600m crater descent game drive
Maasai communities on crater rim

destinations.name: Tarangire National Park
highlights: Largest elephant herds in Tanzania
Iconic giant baobab trees
Tree pythons
Tarangire River as dry-season wildlife magnet
Dry-season Maasai steppe animal migration into the park

destinations.name: Lake Manyara
highlights: Famous tree-climbing lions
Massive flamingo flocks on the lake
Rift Valley escarpment views
Dense groundwater forest
Excellent birdlife (500+ species)
lodges: Fig Tree Mini Lodge and Campsite
destinations.heroTag: The Jewel of the Rift Valley

destinations.name: Mafia Island
highlights: Whale shark snorkeling (world-class Oct–Feb season)
Pristine coral reefs & dive sites
Local BBQ on the shore
Kilindoni Town city tour
Marine Protected Area

destinations.name: Arusha
highlights: Safari operations base
Kilimanjaro gateway
Cultural markets
Mt. Meru views

pages.title: ZanziRocks | Tanzania Safaris & Island Adventures from Zanzibar

sections.name: Hero

content.headline: One Island. Infinite Wild.
content.subheadline: You came to Zanzibar for the beach. But the Serengeti is 45 minutes away. Whale sharks are circling off Mafia Island. And the greatest wildlife spectacle on earth is closer than you think. We'll take you there.
content.backgroundMedia: Autoplay muted video — cinematic: wildlife game drive, Zanzibar beach, boat safari on Rufiji

sections.ux_notes: Full viewport height. Autoplay video (muted, loop). Both CTAs must be above fold. Warm amber overlay to give cinematic feel. Mobile: use static hero image for performance.

sections.name: Trust / Stats Bar
sections.ux_notes: Slim horizontal strip directly below hero fold. High-contrast dark background or brand amber. Builds instant trust before user scrolls.

sections.name: Featured Packages

content.heading: Pick Your Wild
content.subheading: Forty-five minutes from Zanzibar Airport, a lion could be staring back at you through the dust. A herd of elephants could be crossing your path. Choose how deep into Tanzania you want to go.

sections.ux_notes: 3-column grid desktop, carousel mobile. Hover reveals full highlight list. 'View All Packages' link below. Each card shows price upfront — critical for conversion.

sections.name: Interactive Tanzania Destinations Map

content.heading: Tanzania, All in One Place
content.subheading: Nine extraordinary destinations — one team, rooted in Stone Town, to take you to every single one. Tap to explore.
content.mapBase: SVG outline of Tanzania country shape
content.pin_style: CSS keyframe pulsing circles (safari = amber, island = blue)

sections.ux_notes: SVG map with clickable pulsing dots. Desktop: large map with inline tooltips. Mobile: scrollable destination card strip below map. No Google Maps API required.

sections.name: How It Works

content.heading: From Your Zanzibar Hotel to the Heart of Africa — in 3 Steps

steps.title: Pick Your Adventure
steps.desc: Browse fly-in safaris, southern circuit expeditions, and island day trips. Every package is designed for travellers already in Zanzibar — no detours, no wasted time.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.desc: Flights, park permits, lodges, expert guides, all meals. Our Stone Town team coordinates everything from the moment you say yes. You just pack your camera.

steps.title: Live Something Unforgettable
steps.desc: Your private Land Cruiser rolls out at sunrise. Your guide knows exactly where the lions slept last night. This is Tanzania as it was meant to be discovered.

sections.ux_notes: Light-background section (visual break). Large step numbers. Clean icon row. Brief — 3 steps max.

sections.name: Testimonials & Social Proof

content.heading: You Don't Have to Take Our Word for It
content.subheading: Over 500 travellers have made the leap from beach to bush. Here's what they came back saying.

trustpilot.widgetType: TrustBox Micro Review Count or Carousel
trustpilot.setupNote: Requires TrustPilot Business account at trustpilot.com. Embed via TrustBox script.

google.widgetType: Google Reviews via Elfsight or EmbedSocial widget
google.setupNote: Requires Google Business Profile verified for ZanziRocks / Wonderful Zanzibar.

instagram.widgetType: Photo feed via Curator.io or Elfsight Instagram Feed
instagram.setupNote: Requires Instagram Business account @zanzirocks or similar. Shows UGC travel photos.

manualFallbackReviews.name: Sarah M.
manualFallbackReviews.text: I'd been to Africa three times before. This was the first time I forgot to check my phone for three whole days. Our guide read the land like a story — every track, every rustle meant something.

manualFallbackReviews.name: James K.
manualFallbackReviews.text: I woke up at 5am not because of an alarm — but because something enormous was moving just outside my tent. That sound. That morning. That's the ZanziRocks difference.

manualFallbackReviews.name: Anna L.
manualFallbackReviews.package: Mafia Island Whale Shark Day Trip
manualFallbackReviews.text: The whale shark was the length of a school bus and I was in the water alongside it. I've dived across three oceans. Nothing has come close to that moment.

sections.ux_notes: Auto-scrolling carousel. Show star ratings prominently. Show total review count. 'Read all reviews' CTA links to TrustPilot page. Mobile: swipeable cards.

sections.name: Life in the Wild — Photo Gallery

content.heading: The Moments Between the Photos
content.subheading: Shot by real travellers, on real ZanziRocks adventures. No filters, no staging — just Tanzania doing what it does.

sections.ux_notes: Hover overlay shows heart count. Clicking opens Instagram. Mobile: 2-column grid. CTA: 'Follow @zanzirocks' button.

sections.name: Final CTA Banner

content.headline: The Wild Won't Wait.
content.subheadline: The Great Migration, whale shark season, the Big Five inside the crater — Tanzania's greatest moments are tied to the calendar. Tell us when you're here. Our Stone Town team will build the adventure around it.
content.background: Full-width dramatic African landscape (sunset, Serengeti horizon, or Rufiji boat)

sections.ux_notes: High contrast design. Large typography. Just 2 CTAs. One section before footer. Should feel cinematic and urgent.

sections.name: Newsletter Signup

content.headline: Stay Ahead of the Wild
content.subheading: Migration windows. Whale shark season alerts. Flash deals on fly-in packages. Straight to your inbox — before they sell out.
content.incentive: Sign up and receive your free Tanzania Safari Planning Guide — 28 pages of insider knowledge straight from our Stone Town team.

sections.ux_notes: Subtle minimal section above footer. No more than 1 field for low friction. Connect to Mailchimp or HubSpot list.

Safari destinations: animal icon grid. Island destinations: marine species grid

seoTargetKeywords: what to pack for Tanzania safari

floating.message: Hi! I'd like to know more about your Tanzania safari packages.

footer.copyright: © 2026 ZanziRocks / Wonderful Zanzibar Tours & Safaris. All rights reserved.

booking.model: Enquiry → email/WhatsApp → manual confirmation → deposit invoice
booking.formHandler: Formspree (simple) or Netlify Forms or custom API route
booking.autoReply: Send automated confirmation email on form submission

integrations.emailMarketing: Mailchimp or HubSpot — newsletter list + post-booking follow-up sequence

map.destinationsMap: Custom SVG Tanzania outline + CSS animated pulsing pins. No API key needed.
map.contactPageMap: Google Maps embed (static or JS SDK)

integrations.chat: WhatsApp Business API floating button (tawk.to or Tidio as alternative)

recommended.framework: Next.js 14 (App Router) — SSR + image optimization + SEO
recommended.cms: Sanity.io (for packages and blog content management by non-devs)
recommended.images: Cloudinary CDN or Next.js built-in Image
recommended.forms: Formspree (fast setup) or React Hook Form + API route
recommended.fonts: Playfair Display (display) + DM Sans (body) — from Google Fonts

techStack.performanceNotes: Prioritise mobile. Tanzania users are often on 3G/4G — use lazy loading, WebP images only, and code-split aggressively. Target < 2s LCP on mobile.

typography.display: Playfair Display or Cormorant Garamond (luxury editorial, headlines)
typography.body: DM Sans or Source Sans Pro (readability)

designTokens.motif: African sunset gradients, earth tones, organic curves, grass/savannah textures

priorities: Show price upfront on every package card — removes friction
WhatsApp floating CTA visible on every scroll position
Trust signals (star rating, review count) visible above fold or adjacent to CTAs
Sticky booking widget on package detail pages — always-on CTA
Hero CTA must be above fold on mobile (min 44px tap target)
Package cards use visual badges (Most Popular, Top Rated, Bucket List) for decision guidance

ctaHierarchy.label: Book Now / Plan My Trip
ctaHierarchy.placement: Hero, sticky nav, final CTA banner
